title: anthyllis rubra f. tricolor
intro: Anthyllis rubra f. tricolor, also known as kidney vetch, is a flowering plant species native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent qualities, which can help soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of Anthyllis rubra f. tricolor include its potential to treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce swelling. Anthyllis rubra f. tricolor can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
